testCoverage: 24 tests total: 7 PromptLoader tests (load 4 agents, caching, missing file, independent caching), 4 PlannerAgent tests (valid input, with previousBrief, without previousBrief, fixture data), 4 ResearcherAgent tests (with search results, fixture data, empty results, search details), 4 CriticAgent tests (valid input, fixture data, empty claims, prompt content), 5 ComposerAgent tests (valid input, fixture sections, without previousBrief, with previousBrief, coverage window). Comprehensive coverage of all agents and edge cases.
summary: All 4 agents and PromptLoader implemented correctly. Each agent properly loads system prompts, constructs user prompts from domain model inputs, invokes LlmPort with correct agent name, and parses output. Prompt files use camelCase JSON instructions. PromptLoader has ConcurrentHashMap caching. All validation contract assertions VAL-AGENT-001 through VAL-AGENT-005 are covered.
